name: Wide Noodle Pasta with Red Sauce and Cannellini (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces artichoke hearts, rinsed and drained
7 ounces roasted red bell peppers, drained (1 jar)
1 1/2 cups fat-free chicken broth, low salt
15 ounces cannellini beans, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, coarsely chop the tomatoes, artichoke hearts, and peppers. Transfer to a large bowl and add the chicken broth, pesto, oregano, and hot sauce. Dissolve the cornstarch in this mixture.
2. Meanwhile, heat a large saucepan or wok over medium heat. Add oil only if needed, then sweat the onion until well-browned. Add chopped garlic and sauté for 1 minute. Deglaze the pan with white wine.
3. Stirring constantly, add the tomato mixture to the saucepan and cook into a sauce. If necessary, add more broth or water. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper. Add the cannellini beans and heat them through.
4. Cook the pasta al dente. Drain and serve on heated plates (if possible). Spoon the sauce over the pasta, garnish with freshly grated Parmesan cheese, and enjoy.
